profile.name: Adrian Petrovic
profile.availability: Open to full-time and part-time opportunities.
profile.tagline: A passionate computer scientist based in Switzerland, focused on efficient software and modern product thinking.

shell.title: portfolio.sh
welcome: Select a command to inspect profile, skills, and project work.

commands.label: Identity
output: Computer Science EFZ + Passerelle.
Long-term goal: complete higher education at ETH Zurich and work as a software engineer. Potential AI-/ML-specialisation.
I enjoy building, breaking, and reimagining technology across software and hardware.

commands.label: Core Stack
output: Core skills: Python, JavaScript (+TS), Swift, Java
Relevant Frameworks; Tkinter, React, Swift UIKit, etc...
Currently learning: Python.
I prioritize robust architecture and practical delivery.

commands.label: Career Journey
output: 2021-08: Started computer science education.
2023-08: Won Hack United with Reflectory.
2024-08: Started internship at Staubli AG.
2025-07: Finished computer science apprenticeship.
2024-08: Continued employment with 40% at Stäubli AG.
2026-02: Passed Passerele exam.
2026-04: Military recruitment (RS expecting to start in 2026).

commands.label: Project Highlights
commands.description: A few notable projects from my portfolio.
output: HilRes: strong technical depth in HIL resource management with TDD.
Reflectory: Hack United 2023 winner (Best Solo Hack).
RegBankSight and MessageLogger represent my recent technical Python GUI skills with many features and polish.
Projects below are ordered roughly from newer to older.

commands.label: Contact
output: Email: adrian@dinervc.ch
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/adrianpetrovic

projectsSection.description: Projects spanning apprenticeship work, hackathons, and side builds.

projects.name: IPA/LAP: HilRes (Grade 5.5)
projects.description: Python module for managing Hardware-In-the-Loop resources to run tests in parallel with an extensible architecture and TDD workflow.

projects.name: Terminal Portfolio Website
projects.description: This portfolio website with a terminal-inspired interface, animated custom logo system, and structured content architecture.

projects.name: IDPA - Staubli ChatGPT (Grade 5.5)
projects.description: Interdisciplinary apprenticeship project analyzing Staubli's in-house chatbot via interviews, surveys, and usage data to produce recommendations.

projects.name: RegBankSight
projects.description: Application to visualize FPGA register banks in a tree structure with UART-based read/write access down to field level.

projects.name: CircleViz
projects.description: Python script that generates circle comparison diagrams inspired by popular AI model visual benchmarks.

projects.name: AI Arcade
projects.description: Platform for AI-generated games with a library of 16 experiences ranging from simple skill games to complex 3D gameplay.

projects.name: SharcTestRunner
projects.description: Model-based test execution framework for HIL systems, including model import, Python conversion, execution, and issue reporting.

projects.name: TikTakToe (Grade 5.5)
projects.description: TikTok-style social media clone built during apprenticeship with Swift and Firebase as a proof of full-featured mobile delivery.

projects.name: Cool Encryption Tool (Grade 6)
projects.description: Python Tkinter desktop app for file encryption/decryption created as a school project.

projects.name: Dinervc Lab
projects.description: Portfolio experiment in Vue.js that demonstrated adaptability and quick learning in an unfamiliar framework.

projects.name: ViewPeakClips
projects.description: Tool for splitting long videos into social-ready clips with management and upload workflows.

projects.name: Reflectory (Hackathon Winner)
projects.description: AI-powered mental health app built from scratch over one weekend, winning Best Solo Hack at Hack United 2023.

projects.name: Dice Dash
projects.description: Pig Dice-inspired browser game with multiplayer mode, strong AI opponent, custom settings, and immersive audio.

projects.name: Webglide
projects.description: Prompt-driven website generation concept created for startup exploration and school presentation work.

projects.name: SlitherScript
projects.description: Snake game variant with power-ups, dynamic walls, and tunable difficulty for varied gameplay sessions.

projects.name: Die Gespenster von Demmin Reading Journal
projects.description: HTML/CSS reading journal concept with custom typography and visual design built for a school assignment.
